title: Spanish Squid Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful Spanish-inspired squid soup, perfect for a chilly evening. This soup is packed with the natural sweetness of squid and the savory flavors of Spanish cuisine.

ingredients.name: Squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Floral oil
ingredients.notes: such as olive or avocado oil

instructions: Heat the floral oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the squid, diced tomatoes, chicken broth, and sea salt (if using).
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the squid is tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth, or let it cool and puree it in a blender.
Return the soup to the pot and add the crunchy croutons.
Simmer the soup for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the croutons are heated through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley (if desired).
